title: T-002 — Drizzle schema: purchase_orders + po_lines
prompt:
Add Drizzle pgTable definitions for `purchase_orders` and `po_lines` per PRD §5.4. Columns include id, org_id, site_id, po_number, supplier_id FK, currency, tax_code_id, expected_delivery_date, warehouse_id FK, status (string), payment_terms, shipping_method, notes, internal_notes, approval_required, approved_at/by, subtotal/tax_amount/discount_total/total decimals, source_type enum ('manual'|'bulk'|'forecast'|'d365_mrp'), source_reference, ext_jsonb, schema_version, audit. po_lines: id, po_id FK, line_number, product_id FK, quantity, uom, unit_price, discount_percent, discount_amount, line_total computed, expected_delivery_date, confirmed_delivery_date, received_qty, eudr_reference, notes. Include indexes (org_id, status, expected_delivery_date), (supplier_id), (po_id, line_number).

Generate migration `0002_planning_purchase_orders.sql`. RED test asserting both tables export expected columns + indexes are present in generated SQL.

pipeline_inputs.description: Drizzle pgTable definitions for purchase_orders + po_lines.
pipeline_inputs.details: Status as VARCHAR(30) (workflow rules live in registry per §16.1, not enum-locked at DB level beyond display config). source_type as pgEnum. Foreign keys for supplier_id reference suppliers (T-001 must be merged first). line_total stored as DECIMAL(15,2) computed by service layer (not GENERATED). Add CHECK constraint quantity > 0 (V-PLAN-PO-004). Include all indexes named in PRD §5.4. Generate migration via drizzle-kit. RLS uses foundation `app.current_org_id()` function (Wave0 decision; see `_meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md`).
acceptance_criteria: Given the schema file loads, when introspected, then both tables export all PRD §5.4 columns with correct types.
Given the migration is generated, when grepped, then all 3 indexes from §5.4 appear plus quantity > 0 CHECK constraint.
Given `pnpm vitest run src/db/schema/planning/__tests__/purchase_orders.test.ts`, when run, then 0 failures.
Given `pnpm tsc --noEmit`, when run, then no errors.
test_strategy: Write RED schema-shape test asserting columns + indexes + CHECK constraint.
risk_red_lines: Do not read current_setting('app.tenant_id') or current_setting('app.current_org_id') directly — use the foundation app.current_org_id() function so the NULL-safe setter contract is preserved.
Do not use tenant_id as the business-scope column; per Wave0 v4.3 lock it is org_id. See _meta/audits/2026-05-14-tenant-context-remediation.md.
Do not encode workflow transitions at DB level — they live in rule registry §16.1.
Do not skip indexes — performance-critical for dashboard P95 < 500ms (§13.4).
Do not couple to D365-specific source_type values at this layer.

cross_module_dependencies.reason: Uses Settings rule registry, flags, status display, and permission contracts.
Consumes optional D365 integration adapter metadata; D365 never unlocks factory use.
